startPoint.en: Talk to Horacio outside Lord Handelmort's mansion, in East Ardougne.
startPoint.es: Habla con Horacio fuera de la mansión de Lord Handelmort, en East Ardougne.

items.name: Hatchet
items.display: Any hatchet on your tool belt or otherwise to fight with; a rune hatchet or better (including Inferno adze) is recommended.

items.name: Soft clay
items.display: Soft clay (to make the pot lid during the quest after talking to Wizard Cromperty; a bought pot lid or one that was made before the quest will not work).

items.name: Empty pot
items.display: An empty pot (not a plant pot)

items.name: Melee
items.display: A Melee weapon if your hatchet is on your tool belt

rewards.name: Jade vine patch
rewards.display: Access to the Jade vine Farming patch in East Ardougne
Ability to slay the wild jade vine for extra Slayer and Farming experience once every 15 hours

rewards.name: Jade vine maze
rewards.display: Access to the jade vine maze and the giant ant soldiers, giant ant workers, tenacious toucans, giant wasps, frogs, and pernicious parrots within

rewards.name: Eagles' Peak (location)
rewards.display: Transportation between Eagles' Peak and Karamja using the Karamjan Jungle eagle

rewards.name: Roots and Flutes
rewards.display: Roots and Flutes (if not already unlocked by exploring the land just outside of the maze)

text.en: Talk to Horacio outside Handelmort Mansion in East Ardougne and accept the quest.
text.es: Habla con Horacio fuera de Handelmort Mansion en East Ardougne y acepta la misión.

text.en: Talk to Wizard Cromperty in his house to the north-east of the market.
text.es: Habla con Wizard Cromperty en su casa al noreste del mercado.

text.en: Talk to an RPDT employee south of the southern bank in Ardougne.
text.es: Habla con un empleado de la RPDT al sur del banco sur de Ardougne.

text.en: Open the smelly package on the table outside.
text.es: Abre el paquete maloliente sobre la mesa de fuera.

text.en: Return to Wizard Cromperty.
text.es: Vuelve con Wizard Cromperty.

text.en: Make a pot lid (any pot lid acquired before this point will not work). The potter's wheel and pottery oven in the north-west area of East Ardougne, Draynor Village or a portable crafter will work.
text.es: Fabrica una tapa de olla (cualquier tapa de olla que hayas conseguido antes de este punto no funcionará). El torno de alfarero y el horno de cerámica en la zona noroeste de East Ardougne, Draynor Village o un artesano portátil servirán.

text.en: Return to Wizard Cromperty.
text.es: Vuelve con Wizard Cromperty.

text.en: Talk to Garth, the farmer located at the fruit tree patch in Brimhaven, north of the Karamja lodestone.
text.es: Habla con Garth, el granjero situado en la parcela de árboles frutales en Brimhaven, al norte de la piedra de viaje de Karamja.

chatOptions: 2 Talk about the Back to my Roots quest.

text.en: South-east of the nature altar, enter the maze by climbing the vine (north side). Do not leave the maze until you have followed all steps in this section.
text.es: Al sureste del altar de la naturaleza, entra en el laberinto trepando por la enredadera (lado norte). No salgas del laberinto hasta haber completado todos los pasos de esta sección.

text.en: Monsters in the maze drop body parts used in One Foot in the Grave. It is highly recommended to collect these during your time in the maze if you also plan to complete this quest.
text.es: Los monstruos del laberinto sueltan partes del cuerpo usadas en One Foot in the Grave. Se recomienda encarecidamente recogerlas durante tu estancia en el laberinto si también planeas completar esa misión.

text.en: Navigate the maze to reach the roots using the solution provided.
text.es: Recorre el laberinto para llegar a las raíces usando la solución proporcionada.

text.en: Once you reach the root, dig the loose soil, cut the root, then use it on your plant pot.
text.es: Una vez que llegues a la raíz, cava la tierra suelta, corta la raíz y luego úsala en tu maceta.

text.en: If it does not grow, dig up and cut a different root. Out of the five roots in the area, only one of them can successfully grow. Try a different root until it works.
text.es: Si no crece, desentierra y corta una raíz diferente. De las cinco raíces de la zona, solo una conseguirá crecer con éxito. Prueba con otra raíz hasta que funcione.

text.en: Fast travelling before covering the plant will destroy the clipping.
text.es: Viajar rápido antes de cubrir la planta destruirá el esqueje.

text.en: Once the correct root takes, use the potted root on your empty pot to make a sealed pot.
text.es: Una vez que la raíz correcta prenda, usa la raíz plantada en tu maceta vacía para hacer una maceta sellada.

text.en: If you have not obtained all 6 body parts from One Foot in the Grave, it is highly recommended to do so now.
text.es: Si no has obtenido las 6 partes del cuerpo de One Foot in the Grave, se recomienda encarecidamente hacerlo ahora.

text.en: Return to Horacio and speak to him.
text.es: Vuelve con Horacio y habla con él.

text.en: Use the sealed pot on the east patch to plant the vine.
text.es: Usa la maceta sellada en la parcela este para plantar la enredadera.

text.en: Attempt to attack the wild jade vine.
text.es: Intenta atacar la enredadera de jade salvaje.

text.en: Once killed, cut the remaining vine.
text.es: Una vez derrotada, corta la enredadera restante.

text.en: Talk to Horacio.
text.es: Habla con Horacio.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
